name: Football Manager
description:
I don't know lol, I made this for myself since there weren't any football manager bots. If you enjoyed it, please tell me.

Stuff to note if you care: Players have moods. If their mood is low, their performance will drop. Each season, a player's overall rating will either increase or decrease. The older they are, the more likely they'll regress. You can talk to the players. You have a transfer budget. If you're managing a big club like Real Madrid, you'll have more budget to work with, but also more expectations to meet. The media exists (depends on what year), you can interact with them, and they can affect the mood of the players. Adjust the formations and tactics as you see fit. These things really only matter if you're willing to mention them to the bot (and it's not-so-perfect memory in my experience), otherwise, not really.

In the end, just do whatever you want!
creator: R3n36
